name: Diffract Sandbox
description: Sandbox backend powered by Diffract with mirrored local workspaces and SSH-based command execution.

command.label: Diffract Command
command.help: Path or command name for the diffract CLI.

gateway.label: Gateway Name
gateway.help: Optional Diffract gateway name passed as --gateway.

gatewayEndpoint.label: Gateway Endpoint
gatewayEndpoint.help: Optional Diffract gateway endpoint passed as --gateway-endpoint.

from.label: Sandbox Source
from.help: Diffract sandbox source for first-time create. Defaults to diffraction.

policy.label: Policy File
policy.help: Optional path to a custom Diffract sandbox policy YAML.

providers.label: Providers
providers.help: Provider names to attach when a sandbox is created.

gpu.label: GPU
gpu.help: Request GPU resources when creating the sandbox.

autoProviders.label: Auto-create Providers
autoProviders.help: When enabled, pass --auto-providers during sandbox create.

remoteWorkspaceDir.label: Remote Workspace Dir
remoteWorkspaceDir.help: Primary writable workspace inside the Diffract sandbox.

remoteAgentWorkspaceDir.label: Remote Agent Dir
remoteAgentWorkspaceDir.help: Mirror path for the real agent workspace when workspaceAccess is read-only.

timeoutSeconds.label: Command Timeout Seconds
timeoutSeconds.help: Timeout for diffract CLI operations such as create/upload/download.
